home.subtitle: Original works in coloured pencil on black paper

order.title: Order a reproduction

order.name: Your name

studio.title: Studio
studio.name: Nathalie Żieba
studio.bio_1: Since childhood, Nathalie draws what words cannot say. Her works are born in the dark — on black paper, with coloured pencils — as if light had to earn its existence.
studio.bio_2: Her universe exists between two impossible scales: the microscopic and the cosmic. Her forms evoke both cells seen under a microscope and nebulae observed through a telescope. In between lies the interior of the human being.
studio.bio_3: Each work is a dream captured before forgetting. An anatomy of the invisible.
